holdings.infoBox: ECNS is an equity ETF with a total of 276 individual holdings. The top holdings are Kingboard Holdings stock at 5.67%, Dongyue Group at 2.18%, Minth Group at 1.78%, China Everbright Environment Group at 1.38%, and Meitu at 1.32%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI China Small-Cap ETF (ECNS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI China Small Cap index. The fund tracks an index of small-cap Chinese securities. The fund covers roughly the bottom 14% of Chinese securities by market cap. ECNS was launched on Sep 28, 2010 and is issued by BlackRock.
